overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a park area transitioning to the ULSA university campus. The player moves from a dirt trail through trees, past urban streets with light traffic, and approaches campus buildings ending at a bench with NPCs. Bright sunny afternoon with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: park trail with dirt path and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the park area with trees on both sides

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path winding through the park with patches of grass
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
distant downtown buildings visible through the trees
low white concrete wall running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dirt trail through a park area with dense pine trees on both sides. The camera moves forward along the path with a concrete retaining wall visible to the right and a distant city skyline ahead. The environment is natural and empty of people or vehicles.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt trail to concrete sidewalk as the scene becomes more urban
red delivery truck drives past on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk next to an urban road, passing by an apartment building

notable_agents.action: red delivery truck driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: paved concrete walkway with visible cracks and patches
multi-lane asphalt road with red curb markings
large red commercial truck with yellow signage on the side
multi-story residential building with scaffolding on the facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an urban environment as the dirt path gives way to a concrete sidewalk alongside a road. A red delivery truck passes by on the left, and an apartment building with scaffolding comes into view. The vegetation becomes sparse as the setting becomes more built-up.

scene_state.functional_zone: university campus walkway with historic architecture

events.description: entering the ULSA campus area with stone signage and brick buildings
white sports car drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the campus sidewalk passing the ULSA sign and approaching the brick building

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving quickly along the campus road

entered.detail: large stone monument with ULSA lettering surrounded by landscaping
historic pink brick building with arched windows and crenellated roofline
well-maintained green grass area between the sidewalk and building

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a university campus setting with the appearance of the ULSA sign and a historic brick building. The camera walks along a landscaped sidewalk with manicured lawns. A white sports car briefly passes by on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop shelter with benches on campus

events.description: approaching the covered shelter structure with benches
camera slows and comes to a stop near the benches where two individuals are seated

agents.ego_description: approaching two individuals seated on park benches under a covered shelter, then stopping in front of them

notable_agents.action: man in gray shirt and jeans sitting on the left bench looking toward the camera
man in red outfit sitting on the right bench looking toward the camera

entered.detail: covered structure with metal roof supported by striped brick columns
black metal park benches arranged under the shelter

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a covered shelter with park benches where two NPCs are seated. The camera moves under the partial cover of the structure, transitioning from full sun to dappled shade, and comes to a stop in front of the two individuals who are sitting on separate benches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded natural park into a bustling urban university campus. It begins on a dirt trail flanked by dense pine trees and a concrete retaining wall, moving forward toward a distant city skyline. As the path gives way to a concrete sidewalk, the environment shifts into an urban setting where a red delivery truck passes by an apartment building under scaffolding. The scene then opens into the ULSA campus, characterized by manicured lawns, a historic brick building, and a white sports car gliding past on the road. Finally, the camera moves from the bright sunlight into the dappled shade of a covered shelter, coming to a stop before two people seated on park benches.
